description: Use csm-data to send the content of all csv of the output folder to a postgres database with unique name and automatically generated schema

CSM_OUTPUT_ABSOLUTE_PATH.description: Target folder in which to find CSV files to send to the postgres database

CSM_POSTGRES_HOST.description: The host URI of the postgres database

CSM_POSTGRES_PORT.description: The host port of the postgres database

CSM_POSTGRES_DB.description: The name of the postgres database

CSM_POSTGRES_SCHEMA.description: The name of the postgres database schema

CSM_POSTGRES_USER.description: The user name to connect to the postgres database

CSM_POSTGRES_PASSWORD.description: The user password to connect to the postgres database

CSM_ORGANIZATION_ID.description: An organization id for the Cosmo Tech API

CSM_WORKSPACE_ID.description: A workspace id for the Cosmo Tech API

CSM_RUNNER_ID.description: A runner id for the Cosmo Tech API

CSM_RUN_ID.description: A run id for the Cosmo Tech API
